rag_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they reference component ports
Use only visible identifiers from the current component type or implementation scope
Avoid implementation-specific subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations for input assumptions and output guarantees
generic_rules: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks for AGREE contracts
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they reference component ports
Use only visible identifiers from the current component type or implementation scope
Avoid implementation-specific subcomponent paths in component type contracts
anti_patterns: Do not use AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions
Do not compare opaque data types with numeric values
Do not use implementation-specific subcomponent paths in component type contracts
